ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the security (e.g., AAPL for Apple Inc.) */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of security (e.g., Stock, Option, Future) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the security is listed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the security was added to the database */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the security (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the security (e.g., Semiconductors, Banking) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the security */,
  "isin_issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the security */,
  "isin_maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date for bonds or options */,
  "isin_coupon_rate" REAL /* Coupon rate for bonds */,
  "isin_strike_price" REAL /* Strike price for options */,
  "isin_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date for options */,
  "isin_underlying_asset" TEXT /* Underlying asset for options or futures */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the security's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Timestamp for the market data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security during the period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the period */,
  "trade_count" INTEGER /* Number of trades during the period */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Highest bid price during the period */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Lowest ask price during the period */,
  "bid_size" INTEGER /* Size of the highest bid */,
  "ask_size" INTEGER /* Size of the lowest ask */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score for the data (0-100) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who executed the trade */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares or contracts traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., API, manual) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "fee" REAL /* Other fees associated with the trade */,
  "settlement_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade will be settled */,
  "counterparty" TEXT /* Counterparty to the trade */,
  "trade_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the trade */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created in the system */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the user information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade being logged */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data entry related to the trade */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was logged */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., trade executed, market data updated) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., API, user interface) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indexes" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the market index */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the index was created */,
  "index_issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the market index */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of the market index (e.g., broad market, sector) */,
  "index_weighting_method" TEXT /* Weighting method used in the index (e.g., market cap, equal) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the index information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_data" (
  "index_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index data entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market index being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Timestamp for the index data entry */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the index at the given time */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the index */,
  "trade_count" INTEGER /* Number of trades for the index */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price for the index */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the index data (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score for the index data (0-100) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the index data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_data_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indexes ("index_id")
)
